# Picker migration roadmap

<!-- Generated TOC - DO NOT EDIT -->

<!-- Document content (editable) -->

## Overview

This file is a **placeholder** for **`swc-picker`** rendering, CSS, and DOM migration planning. Until it is expanded, treat **`1st-gen/packages/picker/src/Picker.ts`** (`<sp-picker>`) as the primary reference for structure and behavior.

**Responsive UI:** plan for the options **listbox** to use a **tray** (for example bottom sheet) on **smaller viewports** and a **popover** on larger ones; layout details belong here, while **ARIA** and **keyboard** expectations for both modes are in [Picker accessibility migration analysis](./accessibility-migration-analysis.md).

For **accessibility** targets, APG alignment, and keyboard semantics, see [Picker accessibility migration analysis](./accessibility-migration-analysis.md).
